name: partnerships-architect
description: > Design strategic partnerships — technology / channel / strategic / co-marketing — and the programs that scale them. Use when evaluating a potential partner, picking the right partnership type (tech integration vs reseller vs OEM vs strategic alliance), designing a partner program from scratch, structuring a specific partnership deal, modeling ROI on a partnership investment, or auditing an existing partner portfolio for ROI / strategic fit. Pairs with our channel-economics (financial mechanics
author: borghei
summary_zh: 帮你梳理合作伙伴战略的助手，涵盖技术集成、渠道分销、OEM、联合营销等模式选择，可用于评估潜在伙伴、从零搭建合作伙伴计划、设计具体合作条款、测算投入产出，或盘点现有合作组合的价值。
